properties.name: Central Texas Seed Savers
properties.description:
Check out free seeds! Browse the library’s seed drawers and take up to four seed packets per visit. Record your selections on a clipboard provided to check out the seeds. When you have extra seeds to give back, fill out a donation form and drop them off in the labeled drawers.
Learn More
properties.Comments: Occasionally, there will be Seed Gatherings, which are events where the community swaps seeds, shares gardening tips, and connects over sustainable growing.
properties.Address: 710 W Cesar Chavez St, Austin, TX 78701
properties.Hours: Monday - Thursday: 9 a.m. - 8 p.m., Friday: 9 a.m. - 5 p.m., Saturday: 10 a.m. - 5 p.m., Sunday: 12 p.m. - 5 p.m.

properties.name: UT Seed Library - SSB 1.302
properties.description:
Offers free, open-pollinated seeds to anyone in the UT community. Donations are welcome from all—UT-affiliated or not. Drop off or mail in seeds with basic info like plant name, variety, harvest location, and date.
Learn More
properties.Hours: Mon – Fri, 7 a.m. – 8 p.m.; Sat – Sun, 12 p.m. – 6 p.m.
properties.Eligibility: Seeds are available to UT students, staff, and faculty. However, anyone is welcome to donate seeds to the library.

_umap_options.name: Seed Libraries & Garden Support Programs
_umap_options.description: Resources that help communities grow their own food through free seed access and other forms of support.
